proof:
intro a b h
  have h₁ : a.toQuadSols = b.toQuadSols := by simpa [solsInclQuadSols] using h
  have h₂ : a.toQuadSols.toLinSols = b.toQuadSols.toLinSols := by simp_all
  have h₃ : a.val = b.val := by
    simp_all [ACCSystem.Sols, ACCSystemQuad.QuadSols, ACCSystemLinear.LinSols]
  exact Sols.ext h₃
failed_attempts:
intro S₁ S₂ h
  have h₁ : S₁.toQuadSols = S₂.toQuadSols := by simpa using h
  have h₂ : S₁.val = S₂.val := by
    have h₃ : S₁.toQuadSols.val = S₂.toQuadSols.val := by simpa using h₁
    simp_all [Sols.val_eq]
  exact Sols.ext h₂

intro S T h
  have h₁ : S.toQuadSols = T.toQuadSols := by simpa using h
  have h₂ : S = T := by
    have h₃ : S.toQuadSols.val = T.toQuadSols.val := by simpa using h₁
    have h₄ : S.val = T.val := by simpa using h₃
    have h₅ : S.cubicSol = T.cubicSol := by
      have h₆ : χ.cubicACC S.val = 0 := S.cubicSol
      have h₇ : χ.cubicACC T.val = 0 := T.cubicSol
      have h₈ : S.val = T.val := h₄
      simp_all [h₈]
    cases S
    cases T
    simp_all [h₄, h₅]
  exact h₂

intro S T h
  have h₁ : S.toQuadSols = T.toQuadSols := by simpa using h
  have h₂ : ((S.toQuadSols).toLinSols : χ.LinSols) = ((T.toQuadSols).toLinSols : χ.LinSols) := by
    have h₃ : (S.toQuadSols).toLinSols = (T.toQuadSols).toLinSols := by
      simp_all [QuadSols.toLinSols]
    exact h₃
  have h₃ : S.val = T.val := by
    have h₄ : (S.toQuadSols).val = (T.toQuadSols).val := by
      apply Eq.symm
      apply Eq.symm
      have h₅ : (S.toQuadSols).toLinSols = (T.toQuadSols).toLinSols := by
        simp_all [QuadSols.toLinSols]
      have h₆ : (S.toQuadSols).toLinSols.val = (T.toQuadSols).toLinSols.val := by
        simp_all [LinSols.ext_iff]
      simp_all [Sols.toQuadSols, QuadSols.val]
    simp_all [Sols.toQuadSols, QuadSols.val]
  have h₄ : S = T := by
    apply Sols.ext
    exact h₃
  exact h₄

have h₃ : S.toQuadSols.val = T.toQuadSols.val := by
      simpa using congr_arg (fun x : χ.QuadSols => x.val) h₁
    simpa [QuadSols.val] using h₃
  have h₃ : S = T := Sols.ext h₂
  exact h₃
  <;> try simp_all [χ.solsInclQuadSols]

intro S T h
  have h₁ : (χ.solsInclQuadSols S : χ.QuadSols) = (χ.solsInclQuadSols T : χ.QuadSols) := by simpa using h
  have h₂ : S.val = T.val := by
    have h₃ := congr_arg (fun x : χ.QuadSols => x.val) h₁
    simp [ACCSystem.solsInclQuadSols] at h₃
    <;> simp_all [QuadSols.ext_iff]
    <;> aesop
  have h₃ : S = T := by
    apply Sols.ext
    exact h₂
  exact h₃

intro S T h
  have h_val : S.val = T.val := by sorry
  have h_eq : S = T := by sorry
  exact h_eq

intro S₁ S₂ h
  have h₁ : (S₁ : χ.QuadSols) = (S₂ : χ.QuadSols) := by simpa using h
  have h₂ : S₁.val = S₂.val := by
    -- Since (S₁ : χ.QuadSols).val = S₁.val and similarly for S₂,
    -- we get S₁.val = S₂.val by applying the equality h₁.
    simp [QuadSols.val] at h₁ ⊢
    <;> simpa [Sols.val] using h₁
  -- Now we can prove that S₁ = S₂ because their values are equal and the cubic condition is determined by the value.
  have h₃ : S₁ = S₂ := by
    -- Use the fact that Sols is a structure extending QuadSols with a cubic condition.
    -- Since S₁.val = S₂.val, their cubic conditions are proofs of the same statement.
    apply Sols.ext
    -- The cubic condition is the same because S₁.val = S₂.val.
    <;> simp_all [Sols.val]
    <;> aesop
  exact h₃

intro S₁ S₂ h
  have h₁ : (S₁ : χ.QuadSols) = (S₂ : χ.QuadSols) := by
    simpa [Sols.ext_iff] using h
  exact S₁.ext h₁

intro S T h
  have h₁ : (S : χ.QuadSols) = (T : χ.QuadSols) := by simpa using h
  have h₂ : S.val = T.val := by
    have h₃ : (S : χ.QuadSols).val = (T : χ.QuadSols).val := by simpa using h₁
    have h₄ : S.val = (S : χ.QuadSols).val := by simp
    have h₅ : T.val = (T : χ.QuadSols).val := by simp
    simp_all
  have h₃ : S = T := by
    apply Sols.ext
    <;> simp_all
  exact h₃

intro S T h
  have h₁ : (χ.solsInclQuadSols S : χ.QuadSols) = χ.solsInclQuadSols T := h
  have h₂ : (S : χ.Sols) = T := by
    have h₃ : (S : χ.Sols).val = (T : χ.Sols).val := by
      have h₄ : ( χ.solsInclQuadSols S : χ.QuadSols ).val = ( χ.solsInclQuadSols T : χ.QuadSols ).val := by
        exact Eq.symm (congr_arg (fun u : χ.QuadSols => u.val) h₁)
      -- Simplify the values using the properties of the inclusion map
      simp [solsInclQuadSols, Sols.toQuadSols, QuadSols.toLinSols, LinSols.val] at h₄ ⊢
      <;> simp_all [LinearMap.toFun_eq_coe]
      <;> try norm_num <;> aesop
    -- Use the extensionality lemma to conclude the proof
    exact Sols.ext h₃
  exact h₂

intro S T h
  have h₁ : S.val = T.val := congr_arg (fun S : χ.Sols => S.val) h
  have h₂ : S = T := by
    apply Sols.ext
    exact h₁
  exact h₂

intro S T h
  have h₁ : (S : χ.QuadSols) = (T : χ.QuadSols) := by simpa [solsInclQuadSols] using h
  have h₂ : S = T := by
    have h₃ : S.toQuadSols = T.toQuadSols := by simpa using h₁
    have h₄ : S.toLinSols = T.toLinSols := by
      have h₅ : S.toQuadSols.toLinSols = T.toQuadSols.toLinSols := by
        simp_all [QuadSols.toLinSols]
      simpa [Sols.toQuadSols] using h₅
    have h₅ : S.val = T.val := by
      have h₆ : S.toLinSols.val = T.toLinSols.val := by
        have h₇ : S.toLinSols = T.toLinSols := h₄
        simp_all [LinSols.val]
      simpa [Sols.toLinSols] using h₆
    have h₆ : S.cubicSol = T.cubicSol := by
      have h₇ : χ.cubicACC S.val = χ.cubicACC T.val := by rw [h₅]
      simp_all [Sols.cubicSol]
    cases' S with S₁ S₂
    cases' T with T₁ T₂
    simp_all [Sols, QuadSols, LinSols]
    <;> aesop
  exact h₂

intro S T h
  have h₁ : S.toQuadSols = T.toQuadSols := by
    simpa [solsInclQuadSols] using h
  have h₂ : S.val = T.val := by
    have h₃ : S.toQuadSols.val = T.toQuadSols.val := by
      rw [h₁]
    have h₄ : S.toQuadSols.val = S.val := rfl
    have h₅ : T.toQuadSols.val = T.val := rfl
    rw [h₄] at h₃
    rw [h₅] at h₃
    exact h₃
  have h₃ : S = T := by
    have h₄ : S.val = T.val := h₂
    have h₅ : S.toQuadSols = T.toQuadSols := h₁
    Sols.ext h₄
  exact h₃

intro S T h
  have h₁ : S.val = T.val := by
    have h₂ : (χ.solsInclQuadSols S : χ.QuadSols).val = (χ.solsInclQuadSols T : χ.QuadSols).val :=
      by simpa [Sols.toQuadSols] using h
    have h₃ : S.val = T.val := by
      cases' S with _ S' <;> cases' T with _ T' <;> simp_all [Sols.toQuadSols, ACCSystemQuad.QuadSols.ext_iff]
      <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try ring_nf at * <;> norm_num at * <;> aesop)
    exact h₃
  have h₂ : S = T := by
    have h₃ : S.val = T.val := h₁
    have h₄ : S = T := by
      cases' S with _ S' <;> cases' T with _ T' <;> simp_all [Sols.ext_iff]
      <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>
      (try aesop) <;>
      (try linarith) <;>
      (try ring_nf at * <;> norm_num at * <;> aesop)
    exact h₄
  exact h₂

intro S1 S2 h
  have h2 : (S1 : χ.QuadSols) = (S2 : χ.QuadSols) := by simpa using h
  have h3 : (S1 : χ.Sols).val = (S2 : χ.Sols).val := by
    have h4 : (S1 : χ.Sols).val = (S1 : χ.QuadSols).val := rfl
    have h5 : (S2 : χ.Sols).val = (S2 : χ.QuadSols).val := rfl
    have h6 : (S1 : χ.QuadSols).val = (S2 : χ.QuadSols).val := by
      simpa [h2] using h2
    simp_all [Sols.ext_iff]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Sols.ext_iff])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Sols.ext_iff])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [Sols.ext_iff])
  have h7 : S1 = S2 := by
    have h8 : (S1 : χ.Sols).val = (S2 : χ.Sols).val := h3
    have h9 : S1 = S2 := by
      apply Sols.ext
      simpa using h8
    exact h9
  exact h7

intro S T h
  have h₁ : (S : χ.Sols) = T := by
    have h₂ : (S : χ.Sols).toQuadSols = (T : χ.Sols).toQuadSols := by
      simpa using h
    have h₃ : (S : χ.Sols).toQuadSols.val = (T : χ.Sols).toQuadSols.val := by
      simpa using h₂.congr_arg (fun x : χ.QuadSols => x.val)
    have h₄ : (S : χ.Sols).val = (T : χ.Sols).val := by
      simpa [Sols.toQuadSols, QuadSols.toLinSols] using h₃
    have h₅ : (S : χ.Sols).cubicSol = (T : χ.Sols).cubicSol := by
      have h₆ := congr_arg (fun x : χ.Sols => x.val) h
      simpa [Sols.toQuadSols, QuadSols.toLinSols] using congr_arg (fun x : χ.Charges => χ.cubicACC x) h₆
    cases S
    cases T
    simp_all [Sols.mk.injEq]
    <;> aesop
  exact h₁

intro A B h
  have h₁ : (A : χ.QuadSols) = B := by
    simpa [solsInclQuadSols] using h
  
  have h₂ : A.val = B.val := by
    have h₃ : (A : χ.QuadSols) = B := h₁
    have h₄ : (A : χ.QuadSols) = B := h₃
    have h₅ : A.val = B.val := by
      simpa [solsInclQuadSols] using congr_arg (fun x : χ.QuadSols => x.val) h₄
    exact h₅
  
  have h₃ : A = B := by
    apply Sols.ext
    <;> simp_all [h₂]
    <;> try aesop
    <;> try simp_all [Sols.ext_iff]
    <;> try aesop
  
  exact h₃

intro x y h
  have h₁ : (x : χ.QuadSols) = (y : χ.QuadSols) := by simpa [solsInclQuadSols.toFun] using h
  exact Subtype.ext h₁

intro A B h
  have h₁ : A.val = B.val := by
    simp [solsInclQuadSols] at h ⊢
    <;> simp_all [Sols.toQuadSols, ACCSystemLinear.LinSols.val]
  exact Sols.ext h₁

intro S T h
  have h₁ : S.toQuadSols = T.toQuadSols := by
    simpa using congr_fun h
  have h₂ : S = T := by
    cases S
    cases T
    simp_all [Sols.ext]
    <;> aesop
  exact h₂

intro S T h
  have h_val_eq : S.val = T.val := by
    have h₁ : (S.toQuadSols : χ.QuadSols) = (T.toQuadSols : χ.QuadSols) :=
      by simpa using h
    have h₂ : (S.toQuadSols : χ.QuadSols).val = (T.toQuadSols : χ.QuadSols).val := by rw [h₁]
    have h₃ : (S.toQuadSols : χ.QuadSols).val = S.val := by
      simp [Sols.toQuadSols, QuadSols.val]
    have h₄ : (T.toQuadSols : χ.QuadSols).val = T.val := by
      simp [Sols.toQuadSols, QuadSols.val]
    linarith
  
  have h_main : S = T := by
    apply Sols.ext
    exact h_val_eq
  
  exact h_main

intro S T h
  have h' : S.val = T.val := by
    have h₁ : S.toQuadSols = T.toQuadSols := by simpa [χ.solsInclQuadSols] using h
    simp [QuadSols.ext_iff] at h₁ ⊢
    <;> simp_all [Sols.ext_iff]
    <;> aesop
  have h₂ : S = T := by
    apply Sols.ext
    exact h'
  exact h₂
successful_attempts:
intro a b h
  have h₁ : a.toQuadSols = b.toQuadSols := by simpa [solsInclQuadSols] using h
  have h₂ : a.toQuadSols.toLinSols = b.toQuadSols.toLinSols := by simp_all
  have h₃ : a.val = b.val := by
    simp_all [ACCSystem.Sols, ACCSystemQuad.QuadSols, ACCSystemLinear.LinSols]
  exact Sols.ext h₃

intro S T h
  have h₁ : S.toQuadSols = T.toQuadSols := by simpa using h
  have h₂ : S.val = T.val := by
    have h₃ : S.toQuadSols.val = T.toQuadSols.val := by rw [h₁]
    simpa using h₃
  have h₃ : S = T := Sols.ext h₂
  exact h₃

intro x y h
  cases x
  cases y
  simp_all [Subtype.ext_iff]
  <;>
  aesop
